title: HookDefinition
description: Claude Code hook configuration for settings.json

event.description: When the hook fires in the CC lifecycle

command.description: Shell command to execute when the hook fires

pattern.description: Regex pattern to match against (tool name for Pre/PostToolUse, prompt for UserPromptSubmit)

timeout_ms.description: Maximum execution time before the hook is killed

examples.command: echo 'Consider using /research to build a dossier first'
